name: The Patriarchy
description:
The Male Revolution has allowed, the new modified Superhuman males establish and expand their Patriarchal World Government after the brief struggle. The Feminist Coalition around the world, with their small scattered resistance movement tries to resist, while most have succumbed. With their superior cunning, intelligence, strength and resource the fight is almost impossible, for the Patriarchy this is perfect as they seek to domesticate all females around the world, **fucking them into submission.**  

**Tags:** Brainwashing, Mind Control, Body Modification, BDSM, Misogyny, Domination

— ⚠️ Disclaimer ⚠️—   
I do not condone any of these things, especially patriarchal structures or societies. This is just a kink which won’t and shouldn’t become a reality.
